text:
GG0170O2 Discharge Goal 12 Steps Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal ability to go up and down twelve steps with or without a rail. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal ability to go up and down twelve steps with or without a rail. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
05 = Setup or clean-up assistance
06 = Independent
07 = Patient refused
09 =
